title: Metrics API Documentation
description: Comprehensive API documentation for the enhanced metrics server endpoints. Provides real-time monitoring of API latency, error rates, Kafka consumer lag, request rates, and system resources.

endpoints.name: Get Server Metrics (Comprehensive)
endpoints.description: Returns comprehensive server metrics including system resources, API performance, error rates, request rates, and Kafka consumer lag. This is the primary endpoint for dashboard monitoring.

endpoints.name: Get API Latency Metrics
endpoints.description: Returns detailed API latency metrics including percentiles (p50, p95, p99) for the configured time window.

endpoints.name: Get Error Rate Metrics
endpoints.description: Returns error rate metrics including 4xx and 5xx error percentages and counts for the configured time window.

endpoints.name: Get Kafka Consumer Lag
endpoints.description: Returns Kafka consumer lag metrics by topic. Updated every 30 seconds by a background thread.
notes: If kafka-python is not installed, the 'error' field will contain installation instructions
If Kafka is unreachable, the 'error' field will contain connection error details

endpoints.name: Get Request Rate Metrics
endpoints.description: Returns request rate metrics (requests per second/minute) and top endpoints by request count.

endpoints.name: Health Check
endpoints.description: Simple health check endpoint returning basic server status and uptime.

time_window.description: All metrics (except lifetime counters) are calculated over a sliding time window
time_window.note: This means metrics show data from the last 5 minutes

data_retention.description: Metrics are stored in memory with a maximum sample size
data_retention.note: Oldest samples are automatically removed when limit is reached

latency_tracking.description: Latency is measured for every API request using Flask middleware

percentiles.p50: Median latency - 50% of requests are faster

error_tracking.description: Error rates are calculated based on HTTP status codes

kafka_monitoring.description: Kafka consumer lag is monitored by a background thread

configuration.consumer_group: Set via KAFKA_CONSUMER_GROUP environment variable (default: navas-iot-consumers)

dashboard_kpi_mapping.description: Mapping metrics data to dashboard KPI cards

KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS.description: Kafka bootstrap servers for consumer lag monitoring

max_samples.description: Maximum number of metric samples to keep in memory

time_window_seconds.description: Time window for metric calculations (sliding window)

test_script.description: Automated test script to verify all metrics endpoints

metrics_collection_overhead.description: Metrics collection adds minimal overhead to each request

kafka_monitoring.impact: Runs in separate thread, does not block main application

recommendations: Monitor api_latency.p95_ms to detect performance degradation
Track kafka.consumer_lag.total_lag to prevent data backlog
Use uptime.percentage_30d for SLA compliance monitoring
Review top_endpoints to identify hotspots for optimization
